prompt_text:
### Demographics: 47-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Overweight
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.3 kg; Height 182.9 cm; BMI 24.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 118/60 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 249mg/dL; 9 months ago 237mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 198mg/dL; current 125mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.1kg; 9 months ago 80.8kg; 6 months ago 75.7kg; 3 months ago 76.8kg; current 81.3kg), Height (12 months ago 182.9cm; 9 months ago 182.9cm; 6 months ago 182.9cm; 3 months ago 182.9cm; current 182.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 118mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 63mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 60mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 4.5mg/g; 9 months ago 5.7mg/g; 6 months ago 4.1mg/g; 3 months ago 5.7mg/g; current 5mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 60mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 171mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.4g/dL; 9 months ago 12.3g/dL; 6 months ago 11.8g/dL; 3 months ago 11.8g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.66 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
